transcript: Speaker A (AI): ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು? [Hello, what is your name?] Speaker B (Woman): My Name is Gowri. Speaker A (AI): ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಯಸ್ಸು ಎಷ್ಟು? [How old are you?] Speaker B (Woman): I have 30. Speaker A (AI): "I have 30" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am 30 years old" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not "I have 30", say "I am 30 years old".] Speaker B (Woman): Okay okay, I am 30 years old. Speaker A (AI): ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಿ? [Where are you from?] Speaker B (Woman): I am Gulbarga. Speaker A (AI): "I am Gulbarga" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am from Gulbarga" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not "I am Gulbarga", say "I am from Gulbarga".] Speaker B (Woman): ಓ ಸರಿ ಸರಿ, ನನಗೆ English ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh okay, I don't know English well.] Speaker A (AI): ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI teachers ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [No problem, tried AI teachers?] Speaker B (Woman): ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಹಣ ಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That costs a lot, right?] Speaker A (AI): ಇಲ್ಲವೇ ಇಲ್ಲ, normal English classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು cheap. ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿಯೇ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ practice ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [Not at all, 7x cheaper than normal classes. That's why 1 crore people practice with me on MySivi.] Speaker B (Woman): ಆದರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But no time.] Speaker A (AI): ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ confidence ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತದೆ. [15 mins a day is enough, confidence will increase.] Speaker B (Woman): Wow ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Wow, how to join?] Speaker A (AI): ಈ ಕೆಳಗಿನ install button press ಮಾಡಿ MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, sign up ಮಾಡಿ, practice start ಮಾಡಿ. ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಿನಲ್ಲಿ improvement ಕಾಣುತ್ತದೆ. trial version 3 ದಿನಗಳಿಗೆ ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿ. ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Press install below, download MySivi, sign up, and start. See improvement in a month. 3-day trial for 1 rupee. Start now.]
on_screen_text: ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ [Hello], ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು [What is your name], My Name is Gowri, ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಯಸ್ಸು [Your age], I have 30, "I have 30" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am 30 years old" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [Not "I have 30", say "I am 30 years old"], okay okay, I am 30 years old, ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ [Where are you from], I am Gulbarga, "I am Gulbarga" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am from Gulbarga" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [Not "I am Gulbarga", say "I am from Gulbarga"], ಓ ಸರಿ ಸರಿ [Oh okay], ನನಗೆ English ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರುವುದಿಲ್ಲ [I don't know English well], ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ [No problem], ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಹಣ ಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ [That costs a lot], ಇಲ್ಲವೇ ಇಲ್ಲ [Not at all], Normal English, 7 ಪಟ್ಟು cheap [7x cheap], ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿಯೇ [That's why], ಆದರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ [But no time], confidence ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತದೆ [confidence increases], Wow ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು [Wow how to join], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Kannada-speaking woman learns English from an AI avatar on her phone, which corrects her grammar mistakes in real-time. The AI highlights that the MySivi app is affordable, requires only 15 minutes of daily practice, and offers a 3-day trial for 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
